description: Teks deskriptif adalah teks yang menggambarkan suatu objek, orang, atau tempat secara detail sehingga pembaca seolah-olah dapat melihat dan merasakannya. Teks ini menggunakan Simple Present Tense, kata sifat (adjectives), serta verba relasional dan verba aktif. Dalam konteks K3, keterampilan mendeskripsikan secara akurat sangat penting untuk menjelaskan bahaya, APD, prosedur, dan lokasi kerja.

questions.text: What is the main social function of a descriptive text?
questions.explanation: Fungsi sosial teks deskriptif adalah menggambarkan suatu objek, orang, atau tempat tertentu secara detail.

options.text: A. To describe a particular object, person, or place in detail
B. To retell past events in chronological order
C. To explain how to make something step by step
D. To persuade the reader to buy a product

questions.text: A descriptive text mainly focuses on describing a ____ thing.
questions.explanation: Teks deskriptif menggambarkan objek yang spesifik/particular, misalnya 'my mug', 'David', bukan benda secara umum.

questions.text: Which tense is dominantly used in a descriptive text?
questions.explanation: Teks deskriptif dominan memakai Simple Present Tense karena menggambarkan fakta atau keadaan umum suatu objek.

questions.text: A descriptive text makes the reader feel as if they can ____ the object being described.
questions.explanation: Teks deskriptif yang baik membuat pembaca seolah-olah dapat melihat, mendengar, atau merasakan langsung objek tersebut.

options.text: B. see, hear, or feel it directly

questions.text: What are the two main parts of the generic structure of a descriptive text?
questions.explanation: Struktur utama teks deskriptif adalah Identification (identifikasi) dan Description (deskripsi bagian). Kesan/simpulan bersifat opsional.

questions.text: Which part of a descriptive text introduces the object that will be described?
questions.explanation: Identification adalah bagian pembuka yang memperkenalkan objek yang akan dideskripsikan.

questions.text: Which part of a descriptive text contains the detailed features of the object?
questions.explanation: Description (Deskripsi Bagian) adalah inti teks yang berisi pemaparan detail dan ciri-ciri khusus objek.

questions.text: Which word class is dominantly used in descriptive texts to give detailed images?
questions.explanation: Adjectives (kata sifat) sangat dominan digunakan dalam teks deskriptif untuk memberikan gambaran detail.

questions.text: Which of the following is an adjective?
questions.explanation: 'Spacious' (luas) adalah kata sifat. 'Quickly' adalah adverb, 'run' dan 'jump' adalah verba.

questions.text: Choose the correct Simple Present sentence.
questions.explanation: Subjek 'The beach' tunggal (it), maka verba 'be' yang benar adalah 'is': The beach is very clean.

options.text: A. The beach are very clean.
B. The beach is very clean.
C. The beach were very clean.
D. The beach be very clean.

questions.text: Complete the sentence: The temple ____ five tiers.
questions.explanation: Subjek 'The temple' tunggal, sehingga memakai 'has' dalam Simple Present: The temple has five tiers.

questions.text: Which verbs are examples of relational verbs?
questions.explanation: Verba relasional menunjukkan keadaan/atribut, seperti is, am, are, have, has, seem, appear.

questions.text: In the sentence 'Borobudur is a magnificent temple', the word 'is' functions as a ____ verb.
questions.explanation: 'Is' di sini menunjukkan keadaan/atribut objek, sehingga merupakan verba relasional.

questions.text: In 'The waves crash loudly against the rocks', the verb 'crash' is a(n) ____ verb.
questions.explanation: 'Crash' menunjukkan tindakan, sehingga merupakan verba aktif (action verb).

questions.text: The Indonesian word for 'Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)' is ____.
questions.explanation: PPE (Personal Protective Equipment) dalam bahasa Indonesia adalah APD (Alat Pelindung Diri).

questions.text: The English term for 'Bahaya' in a K3 context is ____.
questions.explanation: 'Bahaya' dalam konteks K3 diterjemahkan menjadi 'Hazards'.

questions.text: The English term for 'Prosedur' is ____.
questions.explanation: 'Prosedur' dalam bahasa Inggris adalah 'Procedures'.

questions.text: Which sentence uses an adjective correctly to describe a place?
questions.explanation: 'The room is large and bright' menggunakan adjektiva 'large' dan 'bright' untuk menggambarkan tempat.

options.text: A. The room is large and bright.
B. The room quickly to study.

questions.text: Read: 'My favorite mug is a simple ceramic cup that I use every morning for my coffee.' This sentence belongs to which part of the text?
questions.explanation: Kalimat ini memperkenalkan objek (mug) di awal teks, sehingga termasuk bagian Identification.

questions.text: The opposite of the adjective 'large' is ____.
questions.explanation: Lawan kata 'large' (besar) adalah 'small' (kecil).

questions.text: Why is the Simple Present Tense suitable for descriptive texts?
questions.explanation: Simple Present cocok karena teks deskriptif menggambarkan fakta atau keadaan umum yang berlaku tentang suatu objek.

options.text: A. Because it tells about finished past events
B. Because it describes general facts and current states of an object
C. Because it shows future plans
D. Because it lists chronological steps

questions.text: Choose the correct Simple Present form: 'David ____ a warm, friendly smile.'
questions.explanation: Subjek 'David' tunggal (he), maka 'have' menjadi 'has': David has a warm, friendly smile.

questions.text: Choose the correct sentence: 'The flowers ____ wonderful.'
questions.explanation: Subjek jamak 'The flowers' memakai verba dasar 'smell' (bukan 'smells'): The flowers smell wonderful.

questions.text: Which sentence correctly uses the third person singular '-s' rule?
questions.explanation: Untuk subjek tunggal orang ketiga (she), verba mendapat akhiran -s: She listens carefully.

questions.text: Which figure of speech is shown in 'The sky is like a canvas painted with orange and purple'?
questions.explanation: Penggunaan kata 'like' untuk membandingkan dua hal menjadikannya simile (perumpamaan).

questions.text: Which sentence is a metaphor (not a simile)?
questions.explanation: Metafora membandingkan langsung tanpa 'like/as'. 'Her smile is sunshine' adalah metafora; pilihan dengan 'like'/'as' adalah simile.

options.text: A. Her smile is like sunshine.
B. Her smile is sunshine that brightens the room.
C. She is as bright as the sun.
D. Her eyes shine like stars.

questions.text: In a descriptive text, the order of describing details can be done ____.
questions.explanation: Deskripsi dapat dilakukan secara spasial (tata letak), dari luar ke dalam, atau dari bagian yang paling menonjol.

options.text: B. spatially, from outside to inside, or from the most prominent feature
D. only by time of day

questions.text: The optional closing part of a descriptive text that gives the writer's general impression is called ____.
questions.explanation: Bagian penutup opsional yang berisi kesan umum penulis disebut Kesan/Simpulan (impression/conclusion).

questions.text: Identify the action verb in: 'The waves crash loudly against the rocks.'
questions.explanation: Verba tindakan dalam kalimat tersebut adalah 'crash' yang menunjukkan aksi ombak.

questions.text: Which sentence best describes an object using sensory detail (smell)?
questions.explanation: 'The air always smells like old paper and wood' menggunakan indera penciuman untuk menggambarkan tempat.

options.text: A. The library is on the second floor.
B. The air always smells like old paper and wood.
C. Students study in the library.
D. The library opens at eight.

questions.text: Read the text about the school library. Where is the library located?
questions.explanation: Pada teks, perpustakaan terletak di lantai dua ('located on the second floor').

questions.text: Based on the library text, what sounds can be heard there?
questions.explanation: Teks menyebut hanya terdengar suara halaman buku yang dibalik dan dengung pelan AC ('soft turning of pages and the quiet hum of the air conditioner').

options.text: B. The soft turning of pages and the quiet hum of the air conditioner

questions.text: In the mug text, what color is the inside of the mug?
questions.explanation: Bagian dalam mug dilapisi warna biru tua yang ceria ('a deep, cheerful blue color').

questions.text: In the text about David, what makes him special according to the writer?
questions.explanation: Yang membuat David istimewa adalah caranya mendengarkan ('how he listens') dengan penuh perhatian.

options.text: B. The way he listens and gives full attention

questions.text: Choose the sentence that correctly describes a hazard in a K3 context.
questions.explanation: 'The wet floor is slippery and dangerous' mendeskripsikan bahaya (lantai basah licin) dengan adjektiva, sesuai konteks K3.

options.text: A. The wet floor is slippery and dangerous.
B. The floor went to work yesterday.
C. First, then, next the floor.
D. The floor was cleaned by the worker.

questions.text: A K3 officer describes PPE: 'The safety helmet is hard and bright yellow.' Which words are adjectives?
questions.explanation: Kata sifat dalam kalimat itu adalah 'hard' (keras) dan 'bright yellow' (kuning cerah) yang menggambarkan helm.

questions.text: Which sentence uses a relational verb to describe PPE?
questions.explanation: 'The gloves are thick and waterproof' menggunakan verba relasional 'are' untuk menyatakan atribut sarung tangan.

options.text: A. The gloves are thick and waterproof.
C. The gloves were bought yesterday.
D. First the gloves, then the boots.

questions.text: Which adjective best fits to describe a noisy work area? 'The machine room is very ____.'
questions.explanation: Untuk menggambarkan ruang yang bising, adjektiva yang tepat adalah 'loud' (berisik/keras).

questions.text: Which of these is NOT a feature of descriptive text?
questions.explanation: Penggunaan time conjunctions (first, then, finally) adalah ciri teks rekon/prosedur, bukan teks deskriptif.

options.text: C. Time conjunctions such as first, then, finally
D. Relational verbs like is and has

questions.text: Complete with the correct verb: 'The room ____ filled with tall bookshelves.'
questions.explanation: Subjek tunggal 'The room' memakai 'is' (bentuk pasif present): The room is filled with tall bookshelves.

questions.text: Choose the correct negative Simple Present sentence.
questions.explanation: Untuk subjek tunggal orang ketiga, negatif memakai 'does not + verb dasar': The mug does not have any patterns.

options.text: A. The mug do not has patterns.
B. The mug does not have any patterns.
C. The mug not have patterns.
D. The mug does not had patterns.

questions.text: Which question word is correctly used to ask about the appearance of an object?
questions.explanation: Untuk menanyakan penampilan/keadaan objek, kita gunakan 'What does it look like?'.

options.text: A. When does it look like?
B. What does it look like?
C. Who does it look like time?

questions.text: What is the purpose of the 'Identification' part?
questions.explanation: Identification berfungsi memperkenalkan dan menentukan objek yang akan dideskripsikan kepada pembaca.

options.text: A. To list the steps of a process
B. To introduce and identify the object to be described
C. To retell what happened in the past
D. To give arguments and opinions

questions.text: Which sentence correctly describes a person's character using the present tense?
questions.explanation: 'He is reliable and always keeps his promises' menggambarkan karakter dengan Simple Present yang benar.

options.text: A. He is reliable and always keeps his promises.
B. He was reliable yesterday only.

questions.text: The phrase 'a comfortable handle that fits perfectly' describes which sense aspect of the mug?
questions.explanation: Frasa ini menggambarkan aspek sentuhan/kenyamanan fisik (touch) saat memegang mug.

questions.text: Choose the best opening (Identification) sentence for describing a workplace.
questions.explanation: Kalimat identifikasi yang baik memperkenalkan objek: 'The workshop is a large, busy area on the ground floor.'

options.text: A. First, the worker went home.
B. The workshop is a large, busy area on the ground floor.
C. The workshop was opened by the manager.
D. Then the workshop, next the office.

questions.text: Which word is an adjective describing texture?
questions.explanation: 'Rough' (kasar) adalah adjektiva yang menggambarkan tekstur permukaan.

questions.text: Choose the correct word order: '____ ceramic mug'.
questions.explanation: Dalam urutan adjektiva, ukuran mendahului bahan: 'a large white ceramic mug'.

questions.text: Which sentence shows personification?
questions.explanation: 'The waves whisper to the shore' memberi sifat manusia (berbisik) kepada ombak, yaitu personifikasi.

options.text: B. The waves whisper to the shore.
C. The waves are like mountains.

questions.text: What does the writer feel whenever entering the library?
questions.explanation: Pada bagian kesan, penulis merasakan ketenangan dan fokus ('a sense of calm and focus') saat memasuki perpustakaan.

options.text: B. A sense of calm and focus

questions.text: Which sentence belongs to the Description part of a person?
questions.explanation: 'David is tall and has a warm, friendly smile' adalah pemaparan detail ciri fisik, sehingga bagian Description.

options.text: A. My best friend, David, is one of the kindest people I know.
B. David is tall and has a warm, friendly smile.
C. David went to the market.

questions.text: Choose the correct Simple Present plural sentence.
questions.explanation: Subjek jamak 'The windows' memakai 'let' tanpa -s: The windows let in plenty of natural light.

options.text: A. The windows lets in light.
B. The windows let in plenty of natural light.
D. The windows is let light.

questions.text: What is the difference between descriptive and report text?
questions.explanation: Teks deskriptif menggambarkan objek tertentu/spesifik, sedangkan report text menggambarkan kelas/golongan benda secara umum.

options.text: A. Descriptive describes a particular object; report describes things in general
B. They are exactly the same
D. Report describes only one specific thing

questions.text: Which adjective describes a smell positively?
questions.explanation: 'Fragrant' (harum/wangi) adalah adjektiva yang menggambarkan aroma secara positif.

questions.text: Identify the relational verb: 'His eyes are bright and always seem to be laughing.'
questions.explanation: Verba relasional di sini adalah 'are' dan 'seem', yang menyatakan keadaan/atribut.

questions.text: Complete: 'There ____ no patterns or words on the mug.'
questions.explanation: Karena 'patterns or words' jamak, memakai 'are': There are no patterns or words on the mug.

questions.text: Which sentence is the best closing (impression) for a descriptive text?
questions.explanation: Kalimat penutup yang baik berisi kesan umum: 'This mug makes my morning routine feel special and calm.'

options.text: A. First, I bought the mug.
B. This mug makes my morning routine feel special and calm.
C. The mug is on the table.
D. Next, I drank my coffee.

questions.text: A K3 officer must be able to describe an accident location accurately. Which sentence does this best?
questions.explanation: 'The accident happened near the wet, slippery loading area' mendeskripsikan lokasi dengan detail adjektiva yang akurat.

options.text: B. The accident happened near the wet, slippery loading area.

questions.text: Which set contains only adjectives?
questions.explanation: 'ancient, quiet, spacious' semuanya adjektiva. Pilihan lain mengandung verba atau adverb.

questions.text: Which sentence uses an active verb related to the senses?
questions.explanation: 'The flowers smell wonderful' memakai verba aktif 'smell' yang berkaitan dengan indera penciuman.

questions.text: In the library text, what makes the room feel bright and warm?
questions.explanation: Jendela besar memasukkan banyak cahaya alami sehingga ruangan terasa terang dan hangat.

options.text: B. Large windows that let in plenty of natural light

questions.text: Which sentence correctly uses 'has' for describing a feature?
questions.explanation: Subjek tunggal 'The building' memakai 'has': The building has three large emergency exits.

options.text: A. The building have three exits.
B. The building has three large emergency exits.
C. The building had three exits now.

questions.text: Which is the best Indonesian translation of 'Work Locations'?
questions.explanation: 'Work Locations' diterjemahkan menjadi 'Lokasi Kerja'.

questions.text: Which of the following best describes the function of detail in a descriptive text?
questions.explanation: Detail bertujuan memberi gambaran jelas tentang ciri fisik, kualitas, dan kesan terhadap objek.

options.text: B. To give a clear image of the object's physical features, quality, and impression
C. To list events by time
D. To argue a point of view

questions.text: Which sentence contains both an adjective and a relational verb?
questions.explanation: 'The room is spacious' memuat verba relasional 'is' dan adjektiva 'spacious'.

questions.text: Which describes the object spatially (by layout)?
questions.explanation: 'On the left is a sink, and on the right stands a tall cabinet' menggambarkan tata letak/ruang (spasial).

options.text: B. On the left is a sink, and on the right stands a tall cabinet.

questions.text: What is a synonym for the adjective 'quiet'?
questions.explanation: Sinonim 'quiet' (tenang/sunyi) adalah 'peaceful'.

questions.text: Choose the correct sentence to describe an ongoing general fact about a place.
questions.explanation: 'The library opens at eight every morning' menyatakan fakta umum/rutin dengan Simple Present yang benar.

options.text: A. The library opens at eight every morning.
B. The library opened at eight tomorrow.
C. The library open at eight.
D. The library opening at eight.

questions.text: Which phrase is a noun phrase with an adjective describing a hazard?
questions.explanation: 'a sharp, broken edge' adalah frasa nomina dengan adjektiva 'sharp' dan 'broken' yang menggambarkan bahaya.

questions.text: Which sentence about David's reliability uses correct Simple Present?
questions.explanation: 'If he promises to help you, he will always be there' menggambarkan sifat yang tetap; 'promises' sesuai orang ketiga tunggal.

options.text: A. If he promise to help, he there.
B. If he promises to help you, he will always be there.
C. If he promised to help yesterday.
D. He promising to help you.

questions.text: Which word would NOT typically appear in a descriptive text?
questions.explanation: 'Yesterday' adalah penanda waktu lampau (untuk teks rekon), bukan ciri khas teks deskriptif yang memakai present tense.

questions.text: Which is correct for describing color of an object in present tense?
questions.explanation: 'It is pure white on the outside' menggambarkan warna dengan verba relasional 'is' yang benar.

options.text: B. It is pure white on the outside.

questions.text: What is the role of the small chip on the rim in the mug text?
questions.explanation: Chip kecil di bibir mug mengingatkan penulis pada hari ia membelinya, menambah kesan personal.

options.text: A. It reminds the writer of the day the mug was bought.
B. It makes the mug useless.
C. It changes the mug's color.
D. It is a brand logo.

questions.text: Which adjective correctly describes the size of the library room?
questions.explanation: Teks menyebut ruangan itu 'large' (besar), sehingga adjektiva ukuran yang tepat adalah 'large'.

questions.text: Identify the best title for a descriptive text about David.
questions.explanation: Judul yang baik menyebut objek spesifik: 'My Best Friend, David'.

options.text: C. My Trip to Bali Last Week

questions.text: Which sentence keeps the description objective and physical?
questions.explanation: 'The cabinet is two meters tall and made of steel' menggambarkan ciri fisik objektif yang terukur.

options.text: A. The cabinet is two meters tall and made of steel.
B. The cabinet was scary yesterday.
C. The cabinet then ran away.

questions.text: Which sentence correctly turns 'The room is bright' into a question?
questions.explanation: Pertanyaan yes/no dengan 'be' membalik posisi: 'Is the room bright?'.

options.text: A. Does the room is bright?

questions.text: Which adjective describes temperature suitable for a descriptive text?
questions.explanation: 'Warm' (hangat) adalah adjektiva yang menggambarkan suhu, seperti pada 'it feels warm and solid'.

questions.text: Which sentence demonstrates describing 'from the most prominent feature' first?
questions.explanation: 'The most striking thing about the room is its huge glass wall' memulai dari ciri paling menonjol.

options.text: A. The room has a chair.
B. The most striking thing about the room is its huge glass wall.
C. Yesterday the room was cleaned.
D. First, then, next the room.

questions.text: Choose the sentence with correct subject-verb agreement in the present tense.
questions.explanation: 'The teacher and the students work together' memakai verba jamak 'work' karena subjek gabungan (and).

options.text: A. The teacher and the students works together.
B. The teacher and the students work together.
C. The teacher and the students is working.
D. The teacher and the students works.

questions.text: Which sentence correctly uses an adjective in the comparative degree?
questions.explanation: 'This room is brighter than the other one' adalah penggunaan komparatif 'brighter' yang benar.

options.text: A. This room is more bright than that.
B. This room is brighter than the other one.
C. This room is brightest than that.
D. This room is more brighter.

questions.text: Which sentence uses the superlative adjective correctly to describe a person?
questions.explanation: 'David is one of the kindest people I know' menggunakan superlatif 'kindest' dengan benar.

options.text: A. David is the most kindest person.
B. David is one of the kindest people I know.
C. David is more kind than kindest.
D. David is kinder of all.

questions.text: Analyze: 'The room is large and filled with tall bookshelves that are packed with books of all colors.' How many adjectives describe the bookshelves and books directly?
questions.explanation: Adjektiva langsung: 'tall' (bookshelves) dan 'packed'/'all colors' menggambarkan books; secara langsung yang menjadi atribut adalah 'tall' dan 'packed'. Jawaban menekankan adjektiva 'tall' dan 'packed' (dua).

questions.text: Which sentence best combines a relational verb and an active sensory verb?
questions.explanation: 'The garden is colorful and smells sweet' memadukan verba relasional 'is' dan verba indera aktif 'smells'.

options.text: A. The garden is colorful and smells sweet.
B. The garden went and arrived.
C. The garden first then next.
D. The garden was planted yesterday.

questions.text: A descriptive paragraph should maintain consistency in ____.
questions.explanation: Teks deskriptif sebaiknya konsisten dalam tense (umumnya Simple Present) agar gambaran utuh dan tidak membingungkan.

questions.text: Rewrite correctly in Simple Present: 'The waves crashed loudly.' (as a general description)
questions.explanation: Untuk deskripsi umum, ubah ke present: 'The waves crash loudly.'

options.text: D. The waves will crashed loudly.

questions.text: Which is the most accurate K3 hazard description using descriptive features?
questions.explanation: 'The chemical container is rusty, and a yellow liquid leaks from its base' memakai adjektiva dan verba aktif untuk deskripsi bahaya akurat.

options.text: B. The chemical container is rusty, and a yellow liquid leaks from its base.
C. The container then went away.
D. Finally the container was old.

questions.text: Which option correctly distinguishes simile from metaphor?
questions.explanation: Simile memakai 'like/as' untuk membandingkan, sedangkan metafora menyatakan satu hal adalah hal lain secara langsung tanpa 'like/as'.

options.text: A. Simile uses 'like/as'; metaphor states one thing is another directly

questions.text: Choose the correct passive-like present description: 'The walls ____ painted white.'
questions.explanation: Subjek jamak 'The walls' memakai 'are': The walls are painted white.

questions.text: In an exam, you must describe a fire extinguisher (APAR) for a K3 report. Which sentence is best?
questions.explanation: 'The fire extinguisher is red, cylindrical, and weighs about three kilograms' adalah deskripsi objektif dengan adjektiva dan present tense.

options.text: A. The fire extinguisher is red, cylindrical, and weighs about three kilograms.
B. The fire extinguisher ran fast.
C. The fire extinguisher then finally.
D. The fire extinguisher was used last year by someone.

questions.text: Which sentence is grammatically incorrect for a descriptive text?
questions.explanation: 'The library are quiet' salah karena subjek tunggal 'library' harus memakai 'is', bukan 'are'.

options.text: C. The library has many books.
D. The library smells of old paper.

questions.text: Which best explains why a K3 professional needs descriptive writing skills?
questions.explanation: Profesional K3 perlu mendeskripsikan secara akurat bahaya, APD, prosedur, lokasi kejadian, dan karakteristik bahan berbahaya.

options.text: B. To accurately describe hazards, PPE, procedures, and accident locations

questions.text: Analyze the structure: a text starts with 'The library at my school is a quiet and peaceful place...' then gives details, then ends with 'I feel a sense of calm and focus.' What is the order of parts?
questions.explanation: Urutannya: Identification (pengenalan tempat), Description (detail), lalu Impression/kesan penutup.

questions.text: Which sentence correctly uses an adjective phrase as a feature description?
questions.explanation: 'a comfortable handle that fits perfectly in my hand' adalah frasa adjektiva yang mendeskripsikan fitur pegangan.

options.text: A. a comfortable handle that fits perfectly in my hand
C. first then after that finally
D. was opened by the mayor

questions.text: Choose the best concluding impression about a workplace for a K3 description.
questions.explanation: 'Overall, the workshop is well-organized but still needs better lighting' adalah kesan umum yang sesuai untuk penutup deskriptif.

options.text: B. Overall, the workshop is well-organized but still needs better lighting.

questions.text: Which of these maintains an objective, factual tone suitable for a K3 description?
questions.explanation: 'The ladder is three meters high and has a non-slip base' bersifat objektif dan faktual, sesuai laporan K3.

options.text: A. The ladder is three meters high and has a non-slip base.
B. The ladder is the scariest thing ever in the world!
C. The ladder ran and jumped.
D. I hate the ladder so much.

questions.text: Which sentence correctly uses 'seem' as a relational verb?
questions.explanation: 'His eyes seem bright and friendly' memakai 'seem' sebagai verba relasional yang diikuti adjektiva.

options.text: A. His eyes seem brightly friendly run.
B. His eyes seem bright and friendly.

questions.text: What is the most appropriate adjective order in: 'a ____ steel cabinet'?
questions.explanation: Urutan adjektiva: ukuran sebelum bahan, jadi 'a tall steel cabinet' benar (tall = ukuran, steel = bahan).

questions.text: Which detail in the David text appeals to behavior rather than appearance?
questions.explanation: 'He gives you his full attention and never interrupts' menggambarkan perilaku, bukan penampilan fisik.

options.text: B. He gives you his full attention and never interrupts.

questions.text: Which sentence keeps the present tense AND uses a metaphor to describe a place?
questions.explanation: 'The library is a peaceful island in a busy school' adalah metafora present tense yang menggambarkan tempat.

options.text: A. The library is a peaceful island in a busy school.
B. The library was like an island yesterday.
C. The library ran to the school.
D. First the library, then the class.

questions.text: When describing the characteristics of a dangerous substance (bahan berbahaya), which sentence is most accurate?
questions.explanation: 'The liquid is highly flammable and has a strong, sharp smell' mendeskripsikan karakteristik bahan berbahaya dengan adjektiva tepat.

options.text: A. The liquid is highly flammable and has a strong, sharp smell.
B. The liquid then went next finally.
C. The liquid was spilled last week.
D. The liquid run and jumps.

questions.text: Which sentence correctly fixes the error in: 'The chairs is comfortable.'?
questions.explanation: Subjek jamak 'The chairs' harus memakai 'are': The chairs are comfortable.

questions.text: Which statement about descriptive text is FALSE?
questions.explanation: Pernyataan yang salah adalah bahwa teks deskriptif menceritakan urutan peristiwa lampau — itu adalah ciri teks rekon, bukan deskriptif.

options.text: B. It retells a sequence of past events chronologically.
C. It commonly uses the Simple Present Tense.
D. It describes a particular object, person, or place.

questions.text: Choose the most precise descriptive sentence for an emergency exit (a K3 location).
questions.explanation: 'The emergency exit is a wide, green door located at the end of the corridor' memberi deskripsi lokasi yang jelas dan terperinci.

options.text: A. The emergency exit is a wide, green door located at the end of the corridor.
B. The emergency exit then ran away.
C. The emergency exit was used yesterday.
D. First exit, then door, finally end.

flashcards.back: Teks yang menggambarkan suatu objek, orang, atau tempat tertentu secara detail sehingga pembaca seolah dapat melihat/merasakannya.
To describe a particular person, place, or thing in detail.
1) Identification (pengenalan objek) 2) Description (detail/ciri) 3) Impression/Conclusion (opsional, kesan).
Bagian pembuka yang memperkenalkan objek yang akan dideskripsikan.
Inti teks berisi pemaparan detail dan ciri khusus objek (spasial, luar-dalam, atau dari yang menonjol).
Simple Present Tense, karena menggambarkan fakta/keadaan umum objek. Contoh: The beach is clean.
Subjek tunggal (he/she/it) menambah -s pada verba dan memakai is/has. Contoh: David has a smile.
Kata kerja keadaan/atribut: is, am, are, have, has, seem, appear. Contoh: Borobudur is a temple.
Kata kerja tindakan, sering melibatkan indera: crash, smell, shine. Contoh: The waves crash loudly.
Kata sifat yang dominan dalam teks deskriptif: large, ancient, beautiful, quiet, spacious, fragrant.
Perbandingan memakai 'like/as'. Contoh: The sky is like a canvas painted with orange and purple.
Menyatakan satu hal adalah hal lain secara langsung tanpa 'like/as'. Contoh: The library is a peaceful island.
Opini-ukuran-usia-bentuk-warna-asal-bahan. Contoh: a large white ceramic mug.
Mendeskripsikan berdasarkan tata letak/ruang. Contoh: On the left is a sink, on the right stands a cabinet.
Personal Protective Equipment = APD (Alat Pelindung Diri).
Bahaya. Profesional K3 harus mampu mendeskripsikan hazards secara akurat.
Prosedur. Work Locations = Lokasi Kerja.
Descriptive = Simple Present, menggambarkan objek. Recount = Simple Past, menceritakan peristiwa lampau.
Bagian penutup opsional berisi kesan umum penulis. Contoh: This mug makes my morning feel special and calm.
Mendeskripsikan bahaya, APD, prosedur keselamatan, lokasi kecelakaan, dan karakteristik bahan berbahaya secara akurat.

mindmap.label: Descriptive Text
mindmap.content: Teks yang menggambarkan objek, orang, atau tempat tertentu secara detail menggunakan Simple Present, adjectives, dan verba relasional/aktif.

mindmap.label: Definition & Function
mindmap.content: Definisi dan fungsi sosial teks deskriptif: menggambarkan objek spesifik secara detail.

mindmap.label: Meaning
mindmap.content: Teks yang membuat pembaca seolah dapat melihat, mendengar, atau merasakan langsung objek yang dideskripsikan.

mindmap.label: Social Function
mindmap.content: Menggambarkan ciri fisik, kualitas, dan kesan terhadap suatu objek, orang, atau tempat tertentu.

mindmap.label: vs Recount/Report
mindmap.content: Beda dengan recount (past tense, peristiwa) dan report (objek umum). Descriptive memakai present dan objek spesifik.

mindmap.label: Generic Structure
mindmap.content: Struktur generik teks deskriptif terdiri atas tiga bagian utama.

mindmap.label: Identification
mindmap.content: Bagian pembuka yang memperkenalkan objek yang akan dideskripsikan.

mindmap.label: Description
mindmap.content: Inti teks berisi detail dan ciri khusus objek; bisa spasial, luar-dalam, atau dari yang paling menonjol.

mindmap.label: Impression
mindmap.content: Penutup opsional berisi kesan umum penulis terhadap objek.

mindmap.label: Language Features
mindmap.content: Ciri kebahasaan teks deskriptif: tense, verba, dan kata sifat.

mindmap.label: Relational Verbs
mindmap.content: Verba keadaan/atribut: is, am, are, have, has, seem, appear. Contoh: Borobudur is a temple.

mindmap.label: Action Verbs
mindmap.content: Verba tindakan sering melibatkan indera: crash, smell, shine. Contoh: The waves crash loudly.

mindmap.label: Noun Phrases
mindmap.content: Frasa benda dengan adjektiva untuk detail. Contoh: a comfortable handle that fits perfectly.

mindmap.label: Simple Present Tense
mindmap.content: Tense dominan karena menggambarkan fakta/keadaan umum objek.

mindmap.label: To Be (is/are)
mindmap.content: Subjek tunggal pakai 'is', jamak pakai 'are'. Contoh: The beach is clean; The walls are white.

mindmap.label: -s/es Rule
mindmap.content: Subjek orang ketiga tunggal menambah -s/-es atau memakai has. Contoh: David has a smile; She listens.

mindmap.label: Negative & Question
mindmap.content: Negatif: does not + verb dasar. Tanya be: Is the room bright? Contoh: The mug does not have patterns.

mindmap.label: Adjectives & Figures
mindmap.content: Kata sifat dan bahasa kiasan untuk memperkuat gambaran.

mindmap.label: Types of Adjectives
mindmap.content: Menggambarkan ukuran, warna, tekstur, suhu, bau: large, white, rough, warm, fragrant.

mindmap.label: Adjective Order
mindmap.content: Opini-ukuran-usia-bentuk-warna-asal-bahan. Contoh: a large white ceramic mug.

mindmap.label: Simile
mindmap.content: Perbandingan pakai 'like/as'. Contoh: The sky is like a canvas painted with orange and purple.

mindmap.label: Metaphor
mindmap.content: Menyatakan satu hal adalah hal lain langsung tanpa 'like/as'. Contoh: The library is a peaceful island.

mindmap.label: Examples & Analysis
mindmap.content: Contoh teks deskriptif dan analisisnya: objek, orang, dan tempat.

mindmap.label: Object (A Mug)
mindmap.content: Mug keramik putih besar, dalamnya biru tua, ada chip kecil; membuat pagi terasa istimewa dan tenang.

mindmap.label: Person (David)
mindmap.content: David tinggi, senyum hangat, mata cerah; istimewa karena cara mendengarkannya dan sifatnya yang dapat diandalkan.

mindmap.label: Place (Library)
mindmap.content: Perpustakaan di lantai dua, rak tinggi penuh buku, bau kertas tua, jendela besar; memberi kesan tenang dan fokus.

mindmap.label: Reading Comprehension
mindmap.content: Soal pemahaman: lokasi, warna, suara, dan kesan dari contoh teks deskriptif.

mindmap.label: K3 Application
mindmap.content: Penerapan teks deskriptif dalam konteks K3 untuk laporan yang akurat.

mindmap.label: Hazards
mindmap.content: Mendeskripsikan bahaya: The wet floor is slippery and dangerous. Bahaya = Hazards.

mindmap.label: PPE (APD)
mindmap.content: Mendeskripsikan APD dan spesifikasinya. PPE = Personal Protective Equipment = APD.

mindmap.label: Procedures
mindmap.content: Mendeskripsikan prosedur keselamatan. Prosedur = Procedures.

mindmap.label: Work Locations
mindmap.content: Mendeskripsikan lokasi kerja/kecelakaan: The emergency exit is a wide, green door at the end of the corridor.

mindmap.label: Hazardous Substances
mindmap.content: Mendeskripsikan karakteristik bahan berbahaya: The liquid is highly flammable and has a strong, sharp smell.
